title: The Raid Erupts Across Onigashima
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Denjiro, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Kozuki Alliance as The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.
scene: The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: May good fortune be with you,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We ran out of money, open-saa ma!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Go ask the town folks for charity

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is a good place to take a last stand, wouldn't you agree?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I have escaped from much worse!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are you going to die alongside your master, orochi...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Or are you going to take over the world alongside us?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Understand how much the Samuel value loyalty

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Those of you who chose to oppose...

dialogue.speaker: Kozuki Alliance
dialogue.text: The Samurais of Wano, Num- Bering 5000

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wahaha!! This worked in the end!! Killing eachother would have been pointless!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have you all forgotten about the Warrior code? You...!!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Onigashima Raid Erupts storyline with 37 dialogue beats. The raid erupts across Onigashima as Yamato protects Momonosuke, the Scabbards strike Kaido, and the alliance throws the banquet into war.
